iot.topicrule.timestreamaction.CfnAbout: Describes an action that writes records into an Amazon Timestream table.

iot.topicrule.timestreamaction.BatchMode.Description: Whether to process the action as a batch.

iot.topicrule.timestreamaction.DatabaseN.Description: The name of an Amazon Timestream database that has the table to write records into.

iot.topicrule.timestreamaction.Dimension.Description: Metadata attributes of the time series that are written in each measure record.

iot.topicrule.timestreamaction.RoleArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the role that grants AWS IoT permission to write to the Timestream database table.

iot.topicrule.timestreamaction.TableName.Description: The table where the message data will be written.

iot.topicrule.timestreamaction.Timestamp.Description: The value to use for the entry's timestamp. If blank, the time that the entry was processed is used.
